title: A Crown of Severed Waves
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A disgraced admiral whose bones were replaced with living coral strikes a bargain with a dying sea god to reclaim her rank, only to learn the god is using her bloodline to hatch a new ocean from the drowned cities of the old world.
long_description: A disgraced admiral whose bones were replaced with living coral strikes a bargain with a dying sea god to reclaim her rank, only to learn the god is using her bloodline to hatch a new ocean from the drowned cities of the old world.
